form_load_failure_dialog.header.title.string: An error occurred while loading this form
form_load_failure_dialog.header.title.developer_comment: The title text shown in the header of the dialog.

form_load_failure_dialog.details.label.developer_comment: The label for the clickable summary that reveals technical error information.

odk_web_forms.submit.label.developer_comment: Label for the primary form submission button.

odk_web_forms.validation.error.string: {count, plural, one {# question with error} other {# questions with errors}}
odk_web_forms.validation.error.developer_comment: Error banner message. {count} is the number of validation violations.

odk_web_forms.geolocation.error.string: Location unavailable. Enable GPS and browser permissions, then restart the form to try again.
odk_web_forms.geolocation.error.developer_comment: Error message shown when background geolocation fails.

odk_web_forms.delete.label.developer_comment: Generic label for a delete action button.

odk_web_forms.cancel.label.developer_comment: Generic label for a cancel action button.

odk_web_forms.remove.label.developer_comment: Generic label for a remove action button.

odk_web_forms.save.label.developer_comment: Generic label for a save action button.

geolocation_formatted_value.accuracy.lab.developer_comment: Displays the GPS accuracy in metres. {accuracy} is the numeric accuracy value.

geolocation_formatted_value.latitude.lab.developer_comment: Displays the GPS latitude coordinate. {latitude} is the numeric latitude value.

geolocation_formatted_value.longitude.la.developer_comment: Displays the GPS longitude coordinate. {longitude} is the numeric longitude value.

validation_message.required.error.developer_comment: Default error shown when a required field has no value and the form designer did not specify a custom message.

validation_message.constraint.error.string: This value doesn't meet the constraint.
validation_message.constraint.error.developer_comment: Default error shown when a field's value fails a constraint and the form designer did not specify a custom message.

map_async.load_error.message.developer_comment: Error message shown when the map component fails to load.

map_block.graphics_error.title.developer_comment: Title of the error shown when the browser cannot render the map due to WebGL being unavailable.

map_block.graphics_error.message.string: Your browser cannot display the map now. Enable graphics acceleration settings.
map_block.graphics_error.message.developer_comment: Description of the WebGL error, instructing the user to enable hardware acceleration in their browser.

map_block.location_error.title.developer_comment: Title of the error shown in the map when the browser denies geolocation permission.

map_block.location_error.message.string: Grant location permission in the browser settings and make sure location is turned on.
map_block.location_error.message.developer_comment: Description of what the user should do to resolve a geolocation access error in the map.

map_block.get_location.label.developer_comment: Label for the button in the map overlay that starts watching the device's GPS location.

map_block.drag_vertex_instruction.placed.string: Press and drag to move a point
map_block.drag_vertex_instruction.placed.developer_comment: Instruction shown on the map when a point has been placed and the user can drag points and vertices.

map_block.drag_vertex_instruction.defaul.developer_comment: Instruction shown on the map before a point is placed, when the user can drag points and vertices.

map_block.drag_instruction.placed.developer_comment: Instruction shown on the map when a point has been placed and the user can drag the feature.

map_block.drag_instruction.default.string: Use the location button to center on your current location
map_block.drag_instruction.default.developer_comment: Instruction shown on the map before a point is placed, when the user can drag the feature.

map_confirm_dialog.delete_shape.header.developer_comment: Title of the confirmation dialog shown before deleting a shape.

map_confirm_dialog.delete_trace.header.developer_comment: Title of the confirmation dialog shown before deleting a trace.

map_confirm_dialog.delete_shape.body.string: Are you sure you want to delete this entire shape and start over?
map_confirm_dialog.delete_shape.body.developer_comment: Body text of the confirmation dialog shown before deleting a shape.

map_confirm_dialog.delete_trace.body.string: Are you sure you want to delete this entire trace and start over?
map_confirm_dialog.delete_trace.body.developer_comment: Body text of the confirmation dialog shown before deleting a trace.

map_advanced_panel.longitude.label.developer_comment: Label for the longitude input field in the advanced panel.

map_advanced_panel.longitude.error.developer_comment: Validation error shown when the longitude value entered is out of range.

map_advanced_panel.latitude.label.developer_comment: Label for the latitude input field in the advanced panel.

map_advanced_panel.latitude.error.developer_comment: Validation error shown when the latitude value entered is out of range.

map_advanced_panel.altitude.label.developer_comment: Label for the altitude input field in the advanced panel.

map_advanced_panel.accuracy.label.developer_comment: Label for the accuracy input field in the advanced panel.

map_advanced_panel.import_data.label.developer_comment: Label for the link that opens the import/paste dialog from the advanced panel.

map_controls.zoom_fit_all.description.string: Show all features on the map
map_controls.zoom_fit_all.description.developer_comment: Aria-label for the map control button that zooms to fit all features in view.

map_controls.current_location.descriptio.developer_comment: Aria-label for the map control button that centers the map on the device's current GPS location.

map_controls.undo.description.developer_comment: Aria-label for the map control button that undoes the last map edit.

map_controls.delete.description.string: Delete one vertex or all vertices
map_controls.delete.description.developer_comment: Aria-label for the map control button that deletes the selected vertex or all vertices.

map_controls.open_advanced.description.developer_comment: Aria-label for the map control button that opens the advanced coordinate editing panel.

map_controls.open_full_screen.descriptio.developer_comment: Aria-label for the map control button that expands the map to full screen.

map_controls.close_full_screen.descripti.developer_comment: Aria-label for the map control button that exits full-screen mode.

map_controls.open_info.description.developer_comment: Aria-label for the map control button that opens the info dialog listing available map actions.

map_info_dialog.header.title.developer_comment: Title shown in the header of the dialog that explains available map actions.

map_properties.remove_selection.label.developer_comment: Label for the button that removes the currently saved feature selection.

map_properties.save_selected.label.developer_comment: Label for the button that saves the currently selected map feature.

map_status_bar.no_trace_saved.label.developer_comment: Status bar message shown when no trace (linestring) has been saved yet.

map_status_bar.no_shape_saved.label.developer_comment: Status bar message shown when no shape (polygon) has been saved yet.

map_status_bar.no_point_saved.label.developer_comment: Status bar message shown when no point has been saved yet.

map_status_bar.point_saved.label.developer_comment: Status bar message shown when a point has been saved.

map_status_bar.trace_saved.label.developer_comment: Status bar message shown when a trace (linestring) has been saved.

map_status_bar.shape_saved.label.developer_comment: Status bar message shown when a shape (polygon) has been saved.

map_status_bar.feature_saved.label.developer_comment: Fallback status bar message shown when a feature of an unrecognised geometry type has been saved.

map_status_bar.points_saved.label.developer_comment: Status bar message showing how many points have been saved. {count} is the number of saved points.

map_status_bar.capturing.label.developer_comment: Status bar message shown while the device is actively capturing a GPS location.

map_status_bar.remove_point.label.developer_comment: Full label for the remove button shown on larger screens in the map status bar.

map_status_bar.view_details.label.developer_comment: Label for the button that opens the feature properties panel.

map_status_bar.advanced.label.developer_comment: Label for the button that opens the advanced coordinate editing panel.

map_status_bar.vertex_longitude.label.developer_comment: Longitude component of the selected vertex info shown in the map status bar. {longitude} is the numeric longitude value.

map_status_bar.vertex_latitude.label.developer_comment: Latitude component of the selected vertex info shown in the map status bar. {latitude} is the numeric latitude value.

map_status_bar.vertex_altitude.label.developer_comment: Altitude component of the selected vertex info shown in the map status bar. {altitude} is the numeric altitude value in metres.

map_status_bar.vertex_accuracy.label.developer_comment: Accuracy component of the selected vertex info shown in the map status bar. {accuracy} is the pre-formatted accuracy value.

map_update_coords_dialog.header.title.developer_comment: Title shown in the header of the dialog for importing coordinates via paste or file upload.

map_update_coords_dialog.paste_data.labe.developer_comment: Label for the paste input field in the import coordinates dialog.

map_update_coords_dialog.paste_data.hint.string: Enter coordinates as: Lat Long Altitude Accuracy. Separate multiple points with a semicolon (;).
map_update_coords_dialog.paste_data.hint.developer_comment: Helper text explaining the expected format for pasted coordinate data.

map_update_coords_dialog.upload_file.lab.developer_comment: Label for the file upload section in the import coordinates dialog.

map_update_coords_dialog.upload_file.act.developer_comment: Label for the button that opens the file chooser to upload a GeoJSON file.

map_update_coords_dialog.file_empty.erro.developer_comment: Error shown when the uploaded file contains no content.

map_update_coords_dialog.unsupported_fil.string: Unsupported file type. Please upload a .geojson file.
map_update_coords_dialog.unsupported_fil.developer_comment: Error shown when the uploaded file is not a supported GeoJSON format.

map_update_coords_dialog.parse_failed.er.string: Failed to parse file. Ensure it is a valid GeoJSON.
map_update_coords_dialog.parse_failed.er.developer_comment: Error shown when the uploaded file could not be parsed as valid GeoJSON.

map_update_coords_dialog.incorrect_geome.developer_comment: Error shown when the imported data contains a geometry type incompatible with the current field.

media_block.fetch.error.string: Cannot fetch media. Verify the URL and fetch settings.
media_block.fetch.error.developer_comment: Displayed when media (image, audio or video) fetching fails.

media_block.not_found.error.developer_comment: Displayed when the server returns a 404 or non-200 status.

media_block.unknown.error.string: Cannot fetch media. Unknown error. File: {file}
media_block.unknown.error.developer_comment: Generic fallback for network failures or unexpected exceptions.

video_block.load.error.developer_comment: Displayed when a video element fires a load error. {file} is the resource URL.

audio_block.load.error.developer_comment: Displayed when an audio element fires a load error. {file} is the resource URL.

image_block.load.error.developer_comment: Displayed when an image element fires a load error. {file} is the resource URL.

rank_control.open.label.developer_comment: The label for the button that opens the rank control.

input_geopoint.get_location.label.developer_comment: Label for the button to start capturing the device's current GPS location.

input_geopoint.try_again.label.developer_comment: Label for the button to retry capturing the GPS location after one has already been saved.

input_geopoint.location_error.title.developer_comment: Title of the error message shown when the browser cannot access the device's location.

input_geopoint.location_error.descriptio.string: Grant location permission in the browser settings and make sure location is turned on.
input_geopoint.location_error.descriptio.developer_comment: Description of what the user should do to resolve a location access error.

geolocation_dialog.header.title.developer_comment: Title shown in the header of the dialog while the device is searching for a GPS fix.

geolocation_dialog.accuracy_threshold.in.string: Location will be saved at {accuracyThreshold} m
geolocation_dialog.accuracy_threshold.in.developer_comment: Informational message shown while waiting for a GPS fix. {accuracyThreshold} is the accuracy threshold in metres at which the location will be automatically saved.

geolocation_dialog.elapsed_time.label.developer_comment: Label preceding the elapsed time counter shown while waiting for a GPS fix.

geolocation_dialog.previous_accuracy.inf.developer_comment: Shows the accuracy of the previously saved location in metres. {accuracy} is the numeric accuracy value.

geolocation_dialog.save.label.developer_comment: Label for the button to save the currently captured GPS location.

geopoint_accuracy.good.label.developer_comment: Label shown when the GPS accuracy is within the good threshold.

geopoint_accuracy.acceptable.label.developer_comment: Label shown when the GPS accuracy is within the acceptable threshold (between good and unacceptable).

geopoint_accuracy.poor.label.developer_comment: Label shown when the GPS accuracy does not meet the acceptable threshold.

geopoint_accuracy.unknown.label.developer_comment: Label shown when no GPS accuracy value is available yet.

upload_image_header.take_picture.label.developer_comment: Label for the button to take a picture using the device's camera.

upload_image_header.choose_image.label.developer_comment: Label for the button to choose an image from the device's gallery or file system.

upload_control.choose_file.label.developer_comment: Label for the button to choose a file from the device. Used in the audio, video, and generic file upload headers.

upload_control.drag_and_drop.placeholder.string: Drag and drop files here to upload
upload_control.drag_and_drop.placeholder.developer_comment: Placeholder text shown in the upload area when no file has been selected.

upload_control.file_too_large.error.string: Selected file size exceeds the maximum allowed
upload_control.file_too_large.error.developer_comment: Error message shown when the selected file exceeds the maximum allowed size.

upload_control.must_be_image.error.string: Selected file must be an image file
upload_control.must_be_image.error.developer_comment: Error message shown when the selected file is not an image.

upload_control.must_be_video.error.string: Selected file must be a video file
upload_control.must_be_video.error.developer_comment: Error message shown when the selected file is not a video.

upload_control.must_be_audio.error.string: Selected file must be an audio file
upload_control.must_be_audio.error.developer_comment: Error message shown when the selected file is not an audio file.

upload_control.invalid_file_type.error.string: Selected file does not match expected type
upload_control.invalid_file_type.error.developer_comment: Error message shown when the selected file does not match the expected media type.

upload_delete_dialog.header.title.developer_comment: Title of the confirmation dialog shown before deleting an uploaded file.

upload_delete_dialog.body.message.string: Are you sure you want to delete this file?
upload_delete_dialog.body.message.developer_comment: Body text of the confirmation dialog shown before deleting an uploaded file.

repeat.add.label.developer_comment: Label for the button to add a repeat instance.

repeat.instance.placeholder.developer_comment: Placeholder for the label of a repeat instance.
